playoff.qualified.headline: ${team.name} finish top of the table
playoff.qualified.subhead: League leaders take the top seed into the playoffs
body: ${team.name} have wrapped up the WPL regular season as league leaders on ${qualification.points} points with a net run rate of ${qualification.netRunRate}.
As the top seed, ${team.name} earn the first crack at the final via Qualifier 1, where they will face the second-placed team.
A win in Q1 books a direct ticket to the final; a loss drops them to Q2 for a second chance.

playoff.qualified.headline: ${team.name} qualify for Qualifier 1
playoff.qualified.subhead: Seed ${qualification.seed} secures direct path to the final
body: ${team.name} have booked their place in Qualifier 1 of the WPL playoffs, finishing the regular season in position ${qualification.seed} on ${qualification.points} points.
Net run rate of ${qualification.netRunRate} and a record of ${qualification.wins}W-${qualification.losses}L sees them earn the prized two-life route into the final.

playoff.qualified.headline: ${team.name} clinch playoff berth
body: ${team.name} have squeezed into the WPL playoffs on the final day of the regular season, finishing in position ${qualification.seed} on ${qualification.points} points.
Their reward is the high-stakes Eliminator — win, and they live to fight in Q2. Lose, and the season is over.

playoff.qualified.headline: ${team.name} qualify for the playoffs
body: ${team.name} have officially qualified for the WPL playoffs at seed ${qualification.seed}.
Their regular-season record stands at ${qualification.wins}W-${qualification.losses}L with a net run rate of ${qualification.netRunRate}.

playoff.champion_crowned.headline: ${champion.name} crowned WPL champions
body: ${champion.name} are the new champions of the World Premier League after defeating ${runnerUp.name} by ${margin} in tonight's final.
It caps a memorable season ${season} campaign and writes another chapter into franchise history.
${runnerUp.name} finish as runners-up after a hard-fought playoff run.
